mapper.select: SELECT B.DI,A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD,EC.CODE_NM, A.POOL_CD_NM , B.NAME, B.USR_ID, A.ST_DT, A.ED_DT, B.APPL_YN, TO_CHAR(B.APPL_YN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APPL_YN_DT , B.SEL_RSLT ,B.SEC_PLEDGE_YN , TO_CHAR(B.SEC_PLEDGE_YN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS SEC_PLEDGE_YN_DT,A.STATUS_CD , B.SIGN_1 FROM EVA_POOL_SCHE A LEFT OUTER JOIN EVA_POOL_APPL B ON ( A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = B.PERIOD_DIV_CD AND A.EVA_YEAR = B.EVA_YEAR AND A.POOL_CD = B.POOL_CD ) LEFT JOIN EVA_CODE EC ON A.POOL_CD = EC.ORG_CD AND EC.GROUP_CD = 'POOL_CD' WHERE B.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND B.DI = #{di} AND B.APPL_YN ='Y' ORDER BY A.PERIOD_DIV_CD DESC, A.EVA_YEAR DESC, EC.CODE_NM DESC
SELECT CODE , CODE_NM , ORG_CD FROM EVA_CODE WHERE GROUP_CD ='POOL_CD' AND ORG_CD = #{poolCd}
